use_cases: URL input field for web forms and link submission
Link entry in web applications and dashboards
Address input for various web-based platforms
Form field for collecting website URLs
ai_summary: A minimalist URL input component built with React and Tailwind CSS, featuring clean border styling, focus states with ring indicators, and proper accessibility handling. Part of the ruixen.ui component library, designed for web forms requiring URL entry with consistent theming support through CSS variables.
